Dr. Karen Cox-Haymaker is a certified member of the International Academy of Biological Dentistry and Medicine (IABDM). Dr. Cox-Haymaker started her education earning a Bachelor of Science in Dental Hygiene from the University of Oklahoma as well as a Masters of Public Health. She graduated from the University of Oklahoma School of Dentistry and since has practiced in Hennessey, OK.

Dr. Cox-Haymaker 's concerns about her family encouraged a lifelong passion for continuing her healthcare education. She believes it is her God given purpose to serve others with a fluoride free, mercury free and mercury safe dental practice. Her extensive research and continued education has led to using evolved dental products and procedures to cater to the overall health of her patients.

"It is rewarding to see the transformation a patient goes through when their oral health is improved and maintained, which in turns supports and improves their overall health." - Dr. Karen Cox-Haymaker

Dr. Cox-Haymaker received her Doctor of Naturopathy from Trinty School of Natural Health. She was awarded prestigious Fellowships from The American College of Dentists and The International College of Dentists. Dr. Cox-Haymaker's office is Safe Mercury Amalgam Removal Technique (SMART) certified and uses The Protect Protocol.

Following her dedication to service, Dr. Cox-Haymaker has served in multiple roles at district, state and national levels. She has served on the board and was an examiner for the Western Regional Examining Board which exams dental and dental hygiene candidates for licensure throughout the United States. She has taken many courses from The Pankey Institute, The Dawson Academy, and the International Academy of Dentistry and Medicine (IABDM). She also has taken courses in Temporomandibular Disorders (TMD), Ozone, Nutrition, Health, Biological Dentistry and many others.

Dr. Hochstetler is accomplished in virtually all phases of dentistry. He particularly enjoys the holistic or biological aspect since that can be the most challenging in determining how a person's mouth and over all health are related and what can be done to reconcile the problems.

content.raw: Lyons Dental Taught and trained by the best Dental Leaders in this Country and other Countries, Dr. Linty brings forth a lot more specialty training from the dental world, which allows her to offer more options and treatment to her patients and practice. She enjoys helping patients understand their dental health from a Whole Body Wellness perspective. Healing begins when the relationship between our teeth and body is brought to light, ‘Why’ it happened, and ‘How’ we can get to better dental health together. Born and raised in Dubai, she graduated DDS from New York University College of Dentistry with Honors in Implants in 2004, then did a GP Residency from Dayton VA Medical Center, followed by practicing at the Wright Patterson Air Force Base in Dayton for a few years. She then ventured into Private Practice, and bought Lyons Dental in 2012. Dr. Linty pursued her Continuing Education with zest and passion for learning, and is a Kois Graduate, Misch Implant Graduate, Clinical Mastery Series Graduate, Rondeau Orthodontic Graduate. She’s also trained in Airway and Sleep Dentistry, Full Mouth Rehabilitation, Cosmetic Dentistry, Digital Smile Design, Laser Dentistry, Invisalign, 6 month Smiles Orthodontics, Botox for TMJ, Cosmetic Filler, and now practicing Holistic Dentistry with her focus on whole body wellness for better dental health. Her turn to Biological Dentistry is from her concern with the whole body effects from dental materials, techniques and procedures. She truly believes that patients are not just part of the treatment, they are part of the process. She will listen to you spending quality time and a world of patience. You will be heard and understood, and together we will be built trust, and that’s when the healing begins. Dentistry is not just treatment for teeth, gums and jaw, it is the gateway to better health and a better life. Dr. Linty has three children, and her spouse is a Physician in Springfield. She loves spending with her family and siblings. She enjoys writing, and has a dental blog educating other Dentists. Interior Designing is her creative side that you will see at her practice. She is a Visionary with courage to put it into action. When she’s not with her family or at her practice, she’s on a flight chasing the next Dental class with her insatiable hunger to learn more, be more and bring back the next best cutting edge technology and equipment to Dayton, Ohio.

She’s also trained in Airway and Sleep Dentistry, Full Mouth Rehabilitation, Cosmetic Dentistry, Digital Smile Design, Laser Dentistry, Invisalign, 6 month Smiles Orthodontics, Botox for TMJ, Cosmetic Filler, and now practicing Holistic Dentistry with her focus on whole body wellness for better dental health. Her turn to Biological Dentistry is from her concern with the whole body effects from dental materials, techniques and procedures.

She truly believes that patients are not just part of the treatment, they are part of the process. She will listen to you spending quality time and a world of patience. You will be heard and understood, and together we will be built trust, and that’s when the healing begins. Dentistry is not just treatment for teeth, gums and jaw, it is the gateway to better health and a better life.

Dr. Linty has three children, and her spouse is a Physician in Springfield. She loves spending with her family and siblings. She enjoys writing, and has a dental blog educating other Dentists. Interior Designing is her creative side that you will see at her practice. She is a Visionary with courage to put it into action. When she’s not with her family or at her practice, she’s on a flight chasing the next Dental class with her insatiable hunger to learn more, be more and bring back the next best cutting edge technology and equipment to Dayton, Ohio.

While living in Milwaukee with my wife and newborn son, I graduated from Marquette University in 1972. I joined the U.S. Air Force and served as a captain in the dental division of Scott Air Force base near St. Louis, Missouri. After serving in the Air Force our family of four, soon to be five, moved to Pierce County where we still reside. Shortly after moving to the area my dental practice gradually evolved from traditional dentistry into a more holistic philosophy. During my first five years of private practice in Ellsworth, WI. I came to believe that there was more to dentistry than what I had been taught.
 
I began a path of continuing education that has taken me through advanced training in TMJ therapy, orthopedic orthodontics, cranial sacral therapy, bodywork / massage, nutrition, pain management, safe amalgam removal, biological / environmental dentistry, and more. I am still on that path of continuing education and I learn more all the time, spending 200 – 300 hours in class every year. Recently I’ve been publishing original material in article and textbook formats, as well as creating education materials for doctors and patients.
 
I’m looking forward to our new office, and being able to give our patients even better care. Caring for my patients and helping them reach their health goals is what drives me everyday.

Dr. Josephine Perez, a native of New York City, is a biological Dentist with an impeccable reputation of knowledge, skill and artistry in the dental arts. With over 25 years of experience, know-how and expertise, Dr. Perez promises to deliver a unique experience above and beyond your expectations.

Dr. Josephine Perez majored in Microbiology at the University of Rochester with a minor in Ibero-America Literature. Graduated from Tufts University of Dental Medicine in 1991, top of her class and she interned in New Orleans Navy/Coast Guard Base. This has provided her with an intense work ethic, honesty, and professionalism which is why her patients engage her today from different states and even countries.

Dr. Perez finds it important to balance advanced technologies with knowledge and expertise. She is trained in cosmetic fillers and therapeutic botox. With over 15 years experience and very skillful hands, she incorporates these enhancers into her esthetic practice. She is also consulting faculty at Aesthetic Enhancements Institute in Ft. Lauderdale.

The field of Functional and Integrative Medicine is also one of her passions. Empowering patients to take ownership of their well-being and healing through nutrition, natural and organic supplementation with pharmaceutical grade products. Functional Medicine is proactive and allows us to use protocols that compliment traditional medicine and dentistry. As a Biological dentist, Dr. Perez is certified in Safe Mercury and Amalgam Removal Techniques (S.M.A.R.T.).

A few of our most important guides:
- Biocompatability testing in order to find pathways to reduce inflammation
- Mercury SAFE Practice
- Mercury and Metal Free restorations
- BPA and Bis GMA free fillings
- Fluoride alternatives
- Ceramic Restorations
- Laser Therapy to reduce: pathogens, discomfort, bleeding and healing times
- Oxygen /Ozone Treatments
- Special Air purification system to reduce toxins
- Special Evacuation System for Mercury vapors to protect patients

At Pure Dental Naples, Dr. Josephine Perez's primary purpose is to provide the highest quality of individualized comprehensive dental care possible to her patients. Each patient deserves and receives our focused attention and best efforts to ensure their experience and care exceeds expectations. We make every effort to provide extraordinary dentistry at every visit. We know our practice depends on the success of these efforts and individualized attention.

Dr. Josephine Perez is an active member in good standing of the International Association of Oral and Medical Toxicology (IAOMT), ADA, FDA, WCD, and ACCD.

title.rendered: Samuel D. Petersen, DMD, MS, CIABDM

content.raw:
Dr. Sam Petersen, also known as The Boise Natural Dentist, is an Idaho native. Both he and his wife were raised in South East Idaho. He is passionate about helping his patients achieve whole body health and wellness through biological dentistry and a holistic lifestyle.

Dr. Petersen is a lifelong learner and endearingly surrounds his wife with all his books in their constantly expanding library. He is driven by keeping his family and patients healthy. While his list is long, some of his favorite books include: Regenerate by Sayer Ji, Wim Hoff Method, Breathe by James Nestor, Eat Dirt by Dr. Axe, and the work of Weston Price, to name only a few.

He continually immerses himself in new ideas and ways of thinking to provide the best care for his patients to help his patients achieve optimal health and wellness.

 

Dr. Samuel Petersen's journey began with his four year old daughter's diagnosis of an autoimmune condition, followed by his own struggle with debilitating migraines, and his mother suffering from chronic illness brought on by environmental exposures. These challenges led him to search for help and answers. Dr. Petersen sought out doctor after doctor and received expensive, invasive testing. He was offered symptom-blocking treatments with unknown side effects, none of which provided any real solution to the root of the issues. He knew there had to be a better way.

Through his determination to discover how to help his daughter, himself, and those he loves, his journey led him to an elimination diet, gut health, and a continual quest to optimize wellness. He has an understanding of the struggles so many face, and like so many, this was the catalyst that led him to holistic solutions. After completing dental school, he felt compelled to apply all he had learned from his journey in holistic health to provide deeper healing to help his patients.

The Belief

Dr. Petersen is passionate about keeping teeth ALIVE and vital. He wholeheartedly believes our whole body's health is inseparable from our oral health and vice versa. He is devoted to providing quality care and works diligently to find answers to difficult questions, even if that means completely changing common beliefs and methods.

He believes in partnering with his patients to find the best solution for them. He believes patients have an ultimate say in what is best for themselves and their families. He avidly supports a patient's 'right to choose' and their right to complete informed consent.

Dr. Petersen strives to provide the best dentistry possible while weighing out and balancing the effects and materials such dental treatment may have on a patient systemically.

content.raw:
Dr. Richard Porcelli is a biologic, biomimetic, and cosmetic dentist who helps patients restore health, comfort, and confidence through a whole-mouth, whole-body approach. Patients often seek Dr. Porcelli for complex needs such as biologic oral surgery, implants, full-mouth reconstruction, bite and TMJ disorders, airway-focused dentistry, and natural-looking cosmetic smile design. Dr. Porcelli received his dental education at New York University and has pursued extensive advanced training in the U.S. and internationally. His practice is proud to be one of the first Ghanaati Certified Centers in the United States, following advanced biologic surgical principles taught in Boston-Tufts University, in Germany and Switzerland under Professor Ghanaati. These protocols focus on true bone healing after extractions, healthy blood supply, inflammation control, and long-term stability — not simply closing the gums and hoping the bone heals underneath. He has also trained in biologic dentistry and systemic health approaches through Dr. Rau in Switzerland, and he integrates nutritional and metabolic foundations through training with Dr. Dome and the Real B's. Dr. Porcelli is Protect Protocol certified and SMART certified for safe mercury amalgam removal and prioritizes biocompatible, non-toxic materials selected to support the patient’s overall health. At the Biological Center for Dentistry, we combine advanced diagnostics with supportive therapies that enhance healing and comfort, including ozone therapy and red-light/photobiomodulation therapy, alongside a carefully personalized treatment plan. Dr. Porcelli’s philosophy is simple: a beautiful smile must also function properly. His restorative and cosmetic work is guided by precise bite balance, TMJ stability, and airway awareness, helping protect joints, muscles, teeth, and restorations for long-term success. Credentials, Training & Advanced Care
  • Doctor of Dental Surgery (DDS) — New York University
  • Biologic, Biomimetic & Cosmetic Dentistry
  • Ghanaati Certified Center — one of the first centers in the United States trained in advanced biologic surgical protocols focused on complete bone healing after extractions
  • Advanced biologic oral surgery & regeneration training in Germany and Switzerland
  • Trained under Professor Shahram Ghanaati in biologically guided extraction site management and bone healing principles
  • Advanced biologic dentistry training with Dr. Rau (Switzerland)
  • Nutritional & metabolic dentistry training with Dr. Dome / Real B's
  • SMART-Certified (Safe Mercury Amalgam Removal Technique)
  • AIAOMT & CIABDM aligned biologic dentistry principles
  • Advanced cosmetic and full-mouth reconstruction training
  • Bite balance & TMJ dysfunction diagnosis and treatment
  • Airway-focused dentistry
  • Implant dentistry with biologic planning principles
  • Biocompatible & non-toxic materials selection with compatibility awareness
  • Ozone therapy for antimicrobial support and healing
  • Red-light / photobiomodulation therapy to support tissue repair and recovery
  • Collaboration with high-quality specialty dental laboratories for precision restorations
Dr. Porcelli attributes all of his accomplishments and success to his number one passion — his family life. He is married to his beautiful Romanian wife Alina, who is also in the health profession. Together they have two loving and amazing children, Matei Christian and Milla Sophia. He practices in  Hilton Head Island | Savannah area.

title.raw: Karishma Sheth, DDS, FAGD, FICOI, CIABDM
title.rendered: Karishma Sheth, DDS, FAGD, FICOI, CIABDM

content.raw:
With over 15 years of experience under her belt, Dr. Karishma Sheth brings to you dentistry with gentle hands and a very caring approach. Attention to detail and high quality dentistry are her utmost priority in ensuring her patients receive the care they deserve.

Dr. Sheth earned her bachelor’s degree from The University of Arizona, Tucson and her dental degree from University of California, San Francisco. Dr. Sheth furthered her education by completing a residency at the University of Texas, Houston.

Since then, she is a strong proponent of staying on the forefront of advances in dentistry. As a result, she has over 3000 hours in post graduate advanced continuing education and has earned her fellowship with the Academy of General Dentistry. She has also earned her fellowship with the prestigious International Congress of Oral Implantologists.

Quick weekend safari trips were no big trek for Dr. Sheth as she was born and raised in Nairobi, Kenya! She is multilingual and fluent in 4 languages. Dr. Sheth is a proud mother of two girls and when she is not hard at work she loves to spend time with her husband and their daughters, making memories and living each moment to the fullest.

Dr. Craig Simmons graduated from Marquette University School of Dentistry and went on to serve in the United States Navy as a dentist for three years. During that time he also earned a degree in Advanced Education in General Dentistry.
 
Dr. Simmons has been in private practice for more than seven years and is continuing to expand his practice in holistic dentistry. He is a member of the Holistic Dental Association and a Certified Biological Dentist with the International Academy of Biological Dentistry and Medicine.
 
Since he began practicing dentistry, Dr. Simmons is up to date on many continuing educational classes, ensuring that his patients receive the most comprehensive and advanced dental care.
 
He and his wife Nicole have four boys and enjoy many outdoor sports. You will appreciate his skill in metal-free crown and bridge work, composite-resin filling placement, and oral surgery techniques, including osseous surgery.

title.raw: Bernice Teplitsky, DDS, FAGD, CIABDM, AAIAOMT
title.rendered: Bernice Teplitsky, DDS, FAGD, CIABDM, AAIAOMT

content.raw: I graduated Marquette University School of Dentistry in 2009. While in a General Practice residency at Illinois Masonic Medical Center in Chicago, in the middle of a surgical procedure I realized, “There must be a more natural way to practice dentistry”. Being curious about nutrition from grade school and being a competitive athlete throughout my adolescence, optimal health and nutrition was always of interest to me. Curious about natural medicine from around the world I started searching for ways to integrate my passion of helping people with a more natural form of dentistry. I started questioning the conventional teachings of dentistry which led me down the rabbit hole of holistic, biological dentistry. Throughout my journey I became a Fellow of the Academy of General Dentistry, an Accredited member of the IAOMT and SMART certified. She obtained her Naturopathic Medical Doctor Board Certification, along with a degree in Integrative Biologic Dental Medicine. She is the current president of the Holistic Dental Association. A student of life, Dr. Teplitsky is constantly seeking ways to help her patients improve their health and their overall lives. I have realized that this type of dentistry is not revolutionary, but rather evolutionary. It just takes institutions too long to change their ways and thus schools are not teaching the most modern medicine. I like to consider myself as a forever student seeking to better the condition of every patient that I see. This requires an interdisciplinary approach to medicine, and dentists are a big part of the puzzle. I am here to play my part and to help my patients improve their health by concentrating on their oral health. I’m a member of the following dental organizations: International Academy of Oral Medicine and Toxicology Academy of General Dentistry Holistic Dental Association *(President Elect) American Dental Association Chicago Dental Society Illinois State Dental Society I’m also fluent in Spanish and Russian. Procedures our office provides: SAFE Mercury-Amalgam Removal (SMART Certified and AIAOMT accredited) Ozone Root Canal Extractions PRF Frenectomy (infant, child, and adult) Metal Reactivity Testing Airway orthodontics (child and adult) Sleep Apnea Treatment Zirconia implants Biocompatible Material Testing Mercury Toxicity Test Root Canal DNA test Biomimetic Dentistry / Ribbond Carlson Bridge Cerec / same day crowns/restorations If you’re ready to come see a holistic dentist that cares about your entire health as much as you do, you’ll be in good hands at our office.

title.raw: Wiley Green, DDS, CIABDM, AIAOMT, FIAMA
title.rendered: Wiley Green, DDS, CIABDM, AIAOMT, FIAMA

content.raw: Wiley Green, DDS, AIAOMT, FIAMA Holistic Dental Biological Dentistry Dr. Green graduated from IU Dental School in 1972. He enlisted in the US Army Dental Corps while in school and was stationed in Okinawa for 3 years just missing Vietnam War by one month. Dr. Green taught at IU Dental school from 1975 to 1980 while also practicing in Brownsburg. In 1980 he started his practice full time in Frankfort and performed traditional dentistry until 1993 when a patient, Wayne Cox, showed him the dangers of mercury. Thus he began his present day mercury free-mercury safe' practice, which has evolved into todays biological/holistic care with alternative and biocompatible services as an adjunct to contemporary dental care. Dr. Green is trained and skilled in proper removal techniques of amalgam fillings. He is opposed to water fluoridation and any treatment of children with topical fluoride. Dr. Green also believes root canals can have far-reaching health effects upon the body and must be monitored closely or removed. Periodontal care is observed closely for this same reason. His approach has always been biological with an emphasis on how the mouth relates to the whole body. Dr. Green is also a licensed acupuncturist. Dr. Green has been treating temporomandibular joint problems since 1990. He has developed a highly successful system for those who suffer from different kinds of craniomandibular disorders. His patients often tell him how life altering it is to finally be pain free. Treatment for TMJ problems are performed at Dr. Lau's Pendleton office.

content.rendered:
What makes us at Enclave Dental very special is Dr. Thomas’ natural, holistic approach, which seeks to always treat the underlying problem causing the symptoms and eliminate the real cause, rather than covering up the symptom. This also means she takes great care to use products and restorations which are METAL FREE and BIOCOMPATIBLE. Our office is not simply Mercury Free, it is Mercury Safe. We go the extra mile to make sure our patients and staff are kept safe from the toxic air and materials. Our goal for every patient is to achieve whole body health, rather than just treating symptoms as they appear.
 
In Dr. Thomas’ own words, “What I do for my family, I do for my patients.” As a mother of three who does not expose her children to fluoride, she follows the same standard in her office, and does not expose her patients to fluoride. She is proud to offer her patients complete and wholesome care in a comfortable, spa-like environment and wants everyone to SEE AND FEEL the difference in natural, holistic dental care!
 
Dr. Preetha Thomas received her DMD Degree from the Advanced Standing Program at Harvard School of Dental Medicine in Boston. Her clinical training includes rotations in the Maxillofacial Oral Surgery Department at Massachusetts General Hospital and at Boston Children’s Hospital. She has completed advanced training in oral pathology at Brigham and Women’s Hospital.
 
Before her education in the U.S., Dr. Thomas obtained her Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) and later her Masters in Orthodontics and Dentofacial Orthopedics (MDS) in India. She has lived in Massachusetts with her family for over ten years. During her career here she has worked both in public and private sectors. She was the Dental Director at the Holyoke and Chicopee Health Centers for several years. She worked as Clinical Instructor in the Department of Restorative Dentistry and Biomaterial Sciences at Harvard, Tufts and Boston Schools of Dental Medicine. She also held the position of Consultant Faculty with the Lutheran Medical Center in New York and for the AEGD Residency Program at the Holyoke and Chicopee Health Centers. During her time at Harvard she was actively involved in providing oral health screening and education for homeless adults in Boston. Dr. Thomas was an Associate dentist to Dr. Binca Warren and later Dr.Teddi Olszewski at Northampton Family and Cosmetic Dentists in Massachusetts.
 
In 2013, Dr. Thomas moved to Keller, Texas. She worked alongside Dr. Stacy Cole at Clear Fork Healthy Dental. Her passion for dentistry and her curiosity for biologic dental care took her to the next level that she was striving for. Dr. Thomas is looking forward to bringing her experience in private, public and academic settings to her office at Enclave Dental.
 
Over the past years of her career, she has completed hours of continuing education credits. She believes in keeping herself updated in her field so that she can provide the best service to her patients who entrust their care to her. She has finished 200 hours of CE with Garetty Orthodontics. She has taken hands on courses with Dr. Gordon Christenson. She is a pre-fellow and is working towards her fellowship in AGD. She is an active member of AACP, ADA, TDA and the Fort Worth District dental society. She is also a member of IAOMT and follows their protocol for safe mercury removal. Our office is mercury free and mercury safe!
